zh.lifeSummary: 當Robert Roger Bland於1502年出生在英國英格蘭維斯特莫藍德奧爾頓時，他的父親John Richard Bland26歲，母親Grace Poole25歲。他於1527年1月10日與Anne Pepper在英國越可爾利德斯結婚。他們至少是1個兒子的父母。他去世於1555年7月12日在他的家鄉享年53歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Robert Roger Bland于1502年出生在英国英格兰維斯特莫藍德奧爾頓时，他的父亲John Richard Bland26岁，母亲Grace Poole25岁。他于1527年1月10日与Anne Pepper在英国越可爾利德斯结婚。他们至少是1个儿子的父母。他去世于1555年7月12日在他的家乡享年53岁。

nameMeanings.name: Bland
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: habitational name from a place called Bland in Sedburgh, Yorkshire, the origin of which is uncertain. Possibly it is from Old English (ge)bland ‘storm, commotion’ (from blandan ‘to blend or mingle’), with reference to its exposed situation. The modern English adjective bland did not come into English (from Latin) until the 15th century, and is therefore unlikely to have given rise to surnames.
French: nickname from Old French blant ‘flattering’ (from Latin blandus).

variants.name: Blandin
meanings: Altered form of   Blanding  , a surname of English origin.

nameMeanings.name: Robert
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: One of the many French names of Germanic origin that were introduced into Britain by the Normans; it has since remained in continuous use. It is derived from the nearly synonymous elements hrōd ‘fame’ + berht ‘bright, famous’, and had a native Old English predecessor of similar form (Hreodbeorht), which was supplanted by the Norman name. Two dukes of Normandy in the 11th century bore the name: the father of William the Conqueror (sometimes identified with the legendary Robert the Devil), and his eldest son. It was borne also by three kings of Scotland, notably Robert the Bruce ( 1274–1329 ), who freed Scotland from English domination. The altered short form Bob is very common, but Hob and Dob, which were common in the Middle Ages and gave rise to surnames, are extinct. See also Rupert .

nameMeanings.name: Roger
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From an Old French personal name, Rog(i)er, of Germanic (Frankish) origin, from hrōd ‘fame’ + gār, gēr ‘spear’. This was adopted by the Normans and introduced by them to Britain, replacing the native Old English form Hrōðgār. Roger was one of the most popular boys' names throughout the medieval period, but less so after the Reformation, though it has continued in regular use to the present day. Roger, Count of Sicily ( c.1031–1101 ), son of Tancred, recovered Sicily from the Arabs. His son, also called Roger, ruled Sicily as king, presiding over a court noted for its splendour and patronage of the arts.

variants.name: Rodger
meanings: Variant spelling of   Roger  , in part from the surname derived from the given name in the Middle Ages.

en.lifeSummary: When Robert Roger Bland was born in 1502, in Orton, Westmorland, England, United Kingdom, his father, John Richard Bland, was 26 and his mother, Grace Poole, was 25. He married Anne Pepper on 10 January 1527, in Leeds, Yorkshire, England. They were the parents of at least 1 son. He died on 12 July 1555, in his hometown, at the age of 53.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Robert Roger Bland est né en 1502, à Orton, Westmorland, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, John Richard Bland, avait 26 ans et sa mère, Grace Poole, avait 25 ans. Il a épousé Anne Pepper le 10 janvier 1527, à Leeds, Everwyck, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils. Il est décédé le 12 juillet 1555, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 53 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Robert Roger Bland 1502 in Orton, Westmorland, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war sein Vater John Richard Bland 26 und seine Mutter Grace Poole 25. Er hat am 10. Januar 1527 in Leeds, Yorkshire, England Anne Pepper geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn. Er starb am 12. Juli 1555 im Alter von 53 Jahren in seinem Geburtsort.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Robert Roger Bland è nato il nel 1502 nel Orton, Westmorland, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, il suo padre, John Richard Bland, aveva 26 anni e il suo madre, Grace Poole, aveva 25 anni. Lui sposato Anne Pepper il 10 gennaio 1527, nel Leeds, Yorkshire, England. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio. Morì il 12 luglio 1555, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 53 anni.

ko.lifeSummary: Robert Roger Bland(이)가 1502년 영국 잉글랜드 웨스트모를랜드 오턴에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 John Richard Bland(은)는 26세였고, 그의 어머니 Grace Poole(은)는 25세였다. 그는 1527년 1월 10일 영국 요르크실르 리드즈에서 Anne Pepper(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 1555년 7월 12일 그의 고향에서 53세의 나이로 사망했다.
